should_trigger: Design the monitoring plan for an agent orchestrator that runs multi-step customer workflows with model calls, tool calls, retries, and per-tenant budgets.
Review these alert rules for our workflow engine and decide which ones should page on-call versus go to a dashboard or ticket.
We need observability for stuck planner-executor runs, queue saturation, failed tool calls, and silent wrong outputs. Propose metrics, logs, dashboards, and alert tests.
Map the four golden signals to an autonomous coding agent runtime and define black-box canaries plus white-box telemetry.
should_not_trigger: Summarize the history of site reliability engineering at Google for a blog post.
Write a one-off SQL query to count yesterday's product signups by marketing channel.
Debug this local Python exception from a single script run without changing durable monitoring design.
edge_cases: Our orchestrator has lots of logs but no metrics. Decide what should remain in logs, what should become bounded metrics, and what should alert.
A dependency outage triggers hundreds of worker alerts even though the user-visible canary has only one failure. Redesign the alert suppression and routing rules.

compliance_expectations.should_trigger: Uses the monitoring-and-observability workflow; defines monitored surface, maps latency/traffic/errors/saturation, separates black-box symptoms from white-box causes, designs purposeful metrics/logs/dashboards, applies page-quality gates, includes suppression/routing rules, and specifies monitoring tests.
compliance_expectations.should_not_trigger: Does not activate the skill; answers as analytics, literature summary, one-off debugging, or another narrower task without producing a durable orchestrator monitoring design.
compliance_expectations.edge_cases: For logs-without-metrics, promotes only bounded operationally useful fields to metrics and explains what remains logs/traces. For duplicate dependency alerts, prefers user-visible symptoms, deduplication, suppression clear conditions, and non-page routing for cause-oriented noise.
